title: 2006 Census | Stats NZ
content:
Find data, reports, and information about methods used for the 2006 Census.
New Zealand's 2006 Census of Population and Dwellings was held on 7 March 2006.
Census topic page provides the latest data, news, and information about the Census of Population and Dwellings.
